series.title: Series
series.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this series?

thread.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this thread?

import.pasteDescription: Paste thread data copied from the web

translate.removeAllConfirm: Remove all translations for this thread?

llm.title: LLM Settings
llm.batchBlocksDesc: Send all blocks in one API call per response (saves API calls)

data.title: Data Management
data.resetConfirm: All data (DB, settings, API keys) will be deleted. Continue?
data.resetDesc: DB, settings, and API keys will be deleted and the app will restart.

sections.title: Layout
items: The screen has 3 columns: Series | Threads | Viewer.
Series are optional folders that group threads.
Threads contain responses (posts).
Drag column borders to resize widths.
Use the BG toggle in the viewer header to switch to white background mode.

sections.title: Adding Data
items: {icon:paste} Paste: Paste 2ch/5ch text from the web. Set source language and title.
{icon:upload} Import: Load a .laa file. If a series is selected, threads are added to it.
{icon:plus} Create: Create an empty series/thread.
Use the {icon:plus} button in the viewer header to add responses. Set sequence, name, ID, and date.
Cannot add a response with an existing sequence number.

sections.title: Editing & Deleting
items: {icon:pencil} Edit series/thread/response (switch locale in dropdown).
{icon:trash} Delete items. Deleting a series also deletes all its threads.
Drag & drop threads onto series items to move them.
Drop onto 'All' to unassign from a series.
Drag & drop threads within the list to reorder.
Tags use badge-style input with autocomplete from existing tags. Add with Enter/comma, remove with Backspace.

sections.title: Translation
items: Configure LLM provider, API key, and model in Settings. (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Ollama supported)
Ollama allows free local translation without an API key.
Translation works block-by-block: regex detects Japanese sentences, then LLM judges meaning + translates.
Translate button in viewer header: translates thread title + all responses in parallel.
Per-response translate button (visible on hover): translates a single response.
Hold Shift to highlight Japanese blocks. Shift+click translates that block only.
Hold Shift + click translate buttons to force re-translate.
Drag-select text to reveal a selection translate button.
Remove translation: per-response or all at once.
Cancel button stops translation in progress. Completed translations are kept.
Status bar at bottom shows progress, ETA, and block-level logs.
Settings: concurrent translations, batch block translation (sends all blocks in one API call).

sections.title: Export
items: {icon:download} Export as .laa file for sharing with other users.
Series export: series header + all threads. Thread export: that thread only.
HTML export: series exports as per-thread files with prev/next navigation.
Thread HTML exports as a single file.

sections.title: Multilingual Support
items: Change app language in Settings (Korean / English / Japanese).
All data fields are stored per locale.
Switch locale in the edit dropdown to edit different translations.
If no data exists for current language, fallback order: English, Japanese, Korean.

sections.title: Data Management
items: Settings > Data Management: open data folder or reset all data.
Reset deletes DB, settings, and API keys.
